other_observers: Brandon Percival, Rachel Hopper, Larry Semo; We all saw the bird at about the same time
duration: Saw four times for a total of about 40 seconds
description: small wader with short yellow legs, yellowish bill, and orangish face. Darkish gray back with large orangish wing pannels, seen both on a perched bird and in flight where the wing panels stood out. Cap color grayish but not dark gray. In flight with tips and trailing edge dark gray contasting with inner panel of beautiful orangish.Behaviors: Responded to tape by flying three times, once over head and always coming very close. Perched as close as 50 feet, feet grasping cattail fronds about 2 feet above the ground.Call: non heard by mePlumage: adult female or imm.
